title: CFPB HMDA Credit Score Trends by Loan Type 2018-2025

key_finding.interpretation: FHA agency minimum is 580 FICO. But median approved FHA borrower has 667 FICO — an 87-point gap that represents lender overlay pressure suppressing access below the stated minimum.

ofi_relevance: This CFPB data independently confirms OFI methodology. The 87pp gap between FHA agency minimum (580) and actual median approval FICO (667) is structural overlay — not credit risk management.
